englishDefinitions: To feel warm, happy, and pleased inside.
To have a pleasant feeling of pride, satisfaction, or affection.
persianTranslation: از رضایت و خوشحالی درونی سرشار بودن
examples: I always feel a glow after helping someone in need.
She felt a glow of pride when her son won the prize.
The whole room seemed to feel a glow after the good news.
